title: oreogrammitis holttumii
intro: Oreogrammitis holttumii is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as a type of fern. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis holttumii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, making it a valuable natural remedy in traditional medicine. The plant is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or powdering, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized effectively.
